overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a walk through a rural ranch environment. The player moves through a cattle pasture, exits through a wooden gate into a wildflower meadow, and approaches the main entrance of Pronghorn Ranch with snow-capped mountains in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the pasture observing the cows and surroundings

notable_agents.action: cow lying down in the grass looking toward camera
cow grazing near the wooden fence

entered.detail: weathered wooden post fence enclosing the pasture
mountain range with snow visible on peaks in the distance
dense evergreen trees covering the hillside
wooden ranch house with dark roof
metal windmill structure near the ranch building

segments.scene_description: Walking through a fenced cattle pasture with several cows grazing and resting on the grass. Snow-capped mountains and dense pine forests are visible in the distance beyond the wooden fences, with a ranch building and windmill on the left.

events.description: player character reaches out and opens the wooden gate latch

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden gate and interacting with the latch to open it

notable_agents.action: cow standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: field of purple lupine flowers visible beyond the gate

segments.scene_description: Approaching a large wooden gate structure that marks the exit from the cattle pasture. The player reaches the gate and opens the latch, revealing a meadow of purple wildflowers beyond. The surrounding wooden fences and distant mountains remain visible.

events.description: exits the pasture through the gate into the open wildflower meadow
turns to survey the meadow and surrounding mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking through the meadow and looking around at the mountain scenery

entered.detail: large boulder sitting in the middle of the wildflower field

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the camera explores a wide alpine meadow filled with purple lupine wildflowers. A large boulder sits in the field, and snow-capped mountains rise behind the dense pine forest surrounding the meadow.

events.description: approaches and passes under the main Pronghorn Ranch wooden archway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the ranch entrance and passing under the large wooden archway

entered.detail: large wooden entrance structure with 'Pronghorn Ranch' sign overhead
old wooden wagon or cart parked near the ranch buildings
fence line of the ranch corral area

segments.scene_description: Approaching the main entrance of Pronghorn Ranch marked by a large wooden archway with the ranch name carved into it. The camera passes under the sign revealing the ranch compound with wooden buildings, corral fences, and a parked wagon, while the wildflower meadow falls behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a fenced cattle pasture into the heart of a rustic ranch compound. It begins by moving past grazing cows and a distant windmill, with snow-capped mountains and pine forests framing the horizon beyond the wooden fences. As the camera approaches a large wooden gate, the latch is opened to reveal a vibrant transition into a wide alpine meadow filled with purple lupine wildflowers and scattered boulders. The scene then shifts from the open floral landscape toward a large wooden archway carved with the name of Pronghorn Ranch. Finally, the camera passes under the sign to reveal the inner compound, where wooden buildings, corral fences, and a parked wagon come into view as the meadow recedes.
